items.title: OpenTitan details its pre-silicon security simulation and verification flow
items.summary: lowRISC describes how OpenTitan checks side-channel and fault-injection countermeasures before tape-out using CocoAlma, PROLEAD, formal verification, and simulation-based analysis.

items.title: MLCommons Chakra expands its standardized trace ecosystem for AI systems co-design
items.summary: MLCommons reports native execution-trace support across PyTorch, NVIDIA NeMo, vLLM, ASTRA-sim, and commercial simulators for more portable AI benchmarking and co-design.

items.title: Apache TVM v0.24.0 ships compiler, runtime, and CI modernization updates
items.summary: The v0.24.0 release combines backend fixes, new architecture docs, uv-based Python dependency management, and a GitHub Actions lint workflow.
items.author: ysh329
